## Outcome

Describe user-visible result and why change is needed.

## Safety boundary

Describe affected authority, policy, data, controller, verification, or rollback boundary.

## Validation

- [ ] Backend lint, types, and tests pass
- [ ] Frontend lint and tests pass
- [ ] No secret, personal data, or production endpoint added
- [ ] Demo truth labels remain accurate
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Limitations

State what change does not prove.
